code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok_opt = tokens.get(i)
    let tok = match tok_opt
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let num_opt = string.parse_int(tok)
    let num = match num_opt
    when Some(n)
      n
    when None
      0
    end
    if num > 0
      total = total + num * 2
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("result=#{total}")
  Ok(())
end
